title: Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
